title: Agentic Workspace Local Mixed-Agent Override
description: Machine-local override schema for invocation preferences, delegation capabilities, safety posture, and local memory.

cli_invoke.description: Command prefix this machine should show in copyable Agentic Workspace commands, such as `uv run agentic-workspace`.

shared_config_path.description: Optional path to another machine-local Agentic Workspace local config file. Relative paths resolve from the repository root; repo-local local config values override shared values.

maintainer_mode.description: Machine-local opt-in that surfaces package-maintainer dogfooding report routes during ordinary start/report use without making them shared repo policy.

workspace.description: Local workspace preferences that should not be checked into shared repo config.

supports_internal_delegation.description: Whether the current runtime can hand work to an internal subagent or equivalent in-session worker.

strong_planner_available.description: Whether this local environment has a stronger planning or reasoning path available for quality-sensitive work.

cheap_bounded_executor_available.description: Whether this local environment has a lower-cost executor suitable for bounded implementation when quality is not compromised.

runtime.description: Capabilities of the current agent/runtime on this machine.

prefer_internal_delegation_when_availabl.description: Prefer an in-session or same-runtime handoff when it is available and safe, instead of preparing an external handoff.

handoff.description: Local preferences for internal or external delegation handoff.

safe_to_auto_run_commands.description: Whether this local environment may automatically run configured commands when another local policy explicitly permits automation.

requires_human_verification_on_pr.description: Whether pull request or review closeout on this machine should remain lower-trust until a human verifies it.

safety.description: Local safety limits for command execution and verification.

mode.description: Local control mode for delegation: disable target recommendations, prepare manual handoff prompts, suggest targets without execution, or allow automatic delegation only when safety settings permit it.

delegation.description: Machine-local delegation control. This decides how far local tooling may go after recommending stay-local, stronger-reasoning, external-delegation, or manual-handoff.

mode.description: Local control mode for clarification: stop and ask before proceeding when intent is unclear, surface the ask-human option without forcing it, or continue with the best bounded interpretation unless a hard blocker is present.

clarification.description: Machine-local clarification control for when agents should stop for human input instead of guessing or widening scope.

enabled.description: Whether this machine may use local-only repo memory in addition to checked-in shared Memory.

path.description: Repository-relative path for local-only memory; it must stay ignored and non-authoritative.

local_memory.description: Machine-local memory opt-in and path configuration.

guidance.description: General local guidance overlay items for ordinary checkout-local facts such as tool availability, validation commands, branch conventions, access constraints, and adoption-time hints.

source_maps.description: High-assurance profile path or task mappings to host-owned authority refs, sources, proof profiles, and review expectations.

validation_profiles.description: High-assurance profile validation mappings for changed paths or task markers.

ci_validation.description: High-assurance profile CI availability and substitute-validation declarations.

templates.description: High-assurance profile issue or PR template preservation requirements for API-created work items.

guardrails.description: High-assurance profile sensitive-data and synthetic-fixture guardrails.

unresolved_questions.description: High-assurance profile unresolved assumption/question classifications for closeout.

high_risk.description: High-assurance workflow profile that consumes the general local overlay substrate.

local_overlay.description: Machine-local guidance overlay. It may shape the acting checkout workflow but is not checked-in host policy.

strength.description: Human- or agent-declared capability strength for this target. Use it as a routing hint, not as proof that the target can close the work.

location.description: Where this target runs from the current machine's perspective: local, external, or either. This is a local availability and boundary hint.

confidence.description: Advisory confidence in this target profile from 0 to 1. Agents may tune it from local outcome evidence, but it does not create execution authority.

items.description: One kind of task this target has proven or is expected to handle well.

task_fit.description: Advisory task-fit labels used to explain when this target is appropriate.

items.description: One capability class this target may be suitable for.

capability_classes.description: Advisory capability classes for routing quality-sensitive or mechanical work. These are estimates, not guarantees.

items.description: One locally available way to reach this target.

execution_methods.description: Human-owned execution boundary for this target. Automatic use still requires delegation.mode = "auto" and local safety permission.

model_family.description: Optional opaque model or family identifier for this local target. This is local descriptive metadata, not package-owned vendor policy.

provider.description: Optional provider or runtime name for this local target.

context_capacity.description: Advisory context capacity class. Use this to avoid handing broad or context-heavy tasks to constrained targets.

reasoning_profile.description: Advisory reasoning profile for the target. Structural task classification still outranks this self-description.

cost_class.description: Advisory relative cost class used for down-routing only when quality and proof remain safe.

latency_class.description: Advisory relative latency class for local routing tradeoffs.

safe_task_classes.description: Capability classes this target is explicitly considered safe for when proof remains appropriate.

forbidden_task_classes.description: Capability classes this target must not execute directly, regardless of model confidence.

escalation_target.description: Optional configured target name or route to prefer when this target is overmatched.

confidence_source.description: Optional source for the confidence estimate, such as human-declared, evaluation-derived, or agent-managed.

last_evaluation.description: Optional local note or date for the last capability evaluation used to tune this profile.

human_control_modes.description: Delegation modes in which this target may be considered. This keeps human control explicit.

^.+$.description: One local delegation target profile. Availability fields are human-owned controls; confidence, task fit, and capability classes are advisory estimates.

delegation_targets.description: Named local delegation targets available to this runtime.

string_list.description: List of non-empty strings used by local-only overlay records.

applies_to_paths.description: Repository-relative glob patterns that activate this local guidance item for changed paths.

applies_to_task_markers.description: Case-insensitive task text markers that activate this local guidance item.

signal.description: Short local guidance signal label, such as local-tool-availability or access-constraint.

category.description: Optional category for grouping ordinary local guidance.

guidance.description: Human-readable local guidance for the acting agent.

authority_refs.description: Local or host references that explain why this guidance exists.

required_commands.description: Local validation commands required when this guidance item matches.

optional_commands.description: Optional local commands that may improve confidence.

unavailable_routes.description: Named local tools, CI routes, or access paths that are unavailable in this checkout.

review_owner.description: Local review owner label for this guidance item.

claim_boundary.description: Claim boundary imposed by this local guidance item.

impact.description: How strongly this local guidance item affects routing and closeout claims.

notes.description: Optional local notes for reviewers or future agents.

^.+$.description: One named ordinary local guidance overlay item. It can shape this checkout's workflow but is not shared host policy.

local_guidance_items.description: Named ordinary local guidance overlay items.

applies_to_paths.description: Repository-relative glob patterns that activate this local overlay item for changed paths.

applies_to_task_markers.description: Case-insensitive task text markers that activate this local overlay item.

authority_refs.description: Host-owned authority references that explain why this overlay exists.

required_sources.description: Local source-of-truth references that should be consulted before claims are made.

review_owner.description: Local review owner label for this overlay item.

review_aids.description: Optional local references, commands, or notes that help the reviewer evaluate the work.

proof_profiles.description: Proof profile labels this overlay item contributes when it matches current work.

required_commands.description: Validation commands required by this local overlay item when it matches.

manual_evidence.description: Manual evidence handles or records required before making bounded claims.

optional_commands.description: Optional validation commands that may improve confidence but are not required by this overlay item.

manual_checks.description: Manual checks the acting agent should record or route to a reviewer.

unavailable_routes.description: Named CI or validation routes that are unavailable for this checkout.

validation_state.description: Current CI or validation availability state for this local overlay item.

local_substitute_commands.description: Local substitute commands available when host CI or another validation route is unavailable.

local_substitute_policy.description: How local substitute validation may support or limit completion claims.

host.description: Host system name for a template or work-item preservation rule.

kind.description: Host work-item or artifact kind affected by this overlay item.

paths.description: Repository-relative template or artifact paths that should be preserved.

headings.description: Template headings expected to remain available for API-created work items.

required_fields.description: Template fields expected to remain available for API-created work items.

state.description: Local state classification such as present, missing, or drifted.

sensitive_data.description: Sensitive data classes that must not be exposed in fixtures or examples.

synthetic_fixture_guidance.description: Guidance for acceptable synthetic fixtures or examples.

safe_examples.description: Known-safe example values that may be used instead of sensitive data.

category.description: Unresolved assumption category used to decide whether closeout needs human review or can defer residue.

question.description: Unresolved question that must be answered, reviewed, or explicitly routed.

owner.description: Human or team owner for the unresolved question or overlay item.

residue_route.description: Where unresolved residue should be routed if it cannot be closed in the current work.

reason.description: Local explanation for why this overlay item applies.

claim_boundary.description: Claim boundary imposed by this overlay item.

drift_state.description: Local drift classification for source, template, or validation expectations.

impact.description: How strongly this overlay item affects routing and closeout claims.

notes.description: Optional local notes for reviewers or future agents.

^.+$.description: One named local-only high-risk overlay item. It can shape this checkout's workflow but is not shared host policy.

overlay_items.description: Named local-only high-risk overlay items for one overlay section.
